task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI in the format 's3://bucket-name/key/path' and returns just the bucket name.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to all objects in an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs, which follow the format of 'i-' followed by exactly 17 hexadecimal characters (e.g., i-0a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8).
